records.ety: [F. invoquer, L. invocare; pref. in- in, on + vocare to call, fr. vox voice. See Voice, and cf. Invocate.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Invoked (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Invoking.]

defs: To call on for aid or protection; to invite earnestly or solemnly; to summon; to address in prayer; to solicit or demand by invocation; to implore; as, to invoke the Supreme Being, or to invoke His and blessing.
quotes: Go, my dread lord, to your great grandsire's tomb, . . . Invoke his warlike spirit.
